hardware: GCP spot Tesla T4 (n1-standard-8, 30 GB RAM)

librispeech_clean.title: LibriSpeech test-clean
librispeech_clean.description: Standard read-speech benchmark. 2,620 clips, clean audiobook narration.

librispeech_other.title: LibriSpeech test-other
librispeech_other.description: Harder variant of LibriSpeech with noisier recordings.

ami_ihm.title: AMI IHM test
ami_ihm.description: Multi-speaker meeting audio via individual headset mics — the hardest realistic benchmark in this sweep.

earnings22.title: Earnings22 test
earnings22.description: Financial earnings calls — long-form, accented, domain-specific vocabulary.

fleurs_es.title: FLEURS Spanish (es_419)
fleurs_es.description: Google's 102-language multilingual ASR benchmark — Latin American Spanish.

common_voice_22_lt.title: Common Voice 22 — Lithuanian
common_voice_22_lt.description: Crowd-sourced read speech. fsicoli mirror on HF (Mozilla moved official CV off HF Oct 2025).
